ingredients_text: Minced Beef and Tomato Sauce (50%) [Beef 34%, Water, Onion, Peas 10%, Carrot 10%, Chopped Tomatoes (Tomatoes, Tomato Juice, Citric Acid ), Beef Stock (Water, Beef Stock 30% (Beef Bone, Water), Yeast Extract, Salt, Lemon Juice Concentrate, Beef Fat 1%), Cornflour, Worcester Sauce (Water, Spirit Vinegar, Sugar, Onion, Tamarind Paste, Ginger, Garlic, Cloves), Tomato Purée, Parsley, Ground Black Pepper], Sweet Potato Mash (50%) [Sweet Potato 45%, Potato 39%, Carrot 15%, Salt, White Pepper]
